section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports using clobetasol for scalp psoriasis and states he has no cervical lymphadenopathy.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The first clause (reports using clobetasol) is appropriate for S as current medication use, but the second clause (states he has no cervical lymphadenopathy) is phrased as a patient statement about a physical finding that typically requires clinician exam. If this is meant as an exam finding, it would belong in O; if it is truly patient-reported, S is acceptable. The mixed content makes the placement slightly confusing but not clearly misleading.
